description_long: This lamppost features a slender, vertical black pole rising from a flat, textured ground surface that resembles concrete or paving stones. At the top of the pole is a single spherical white lamp head, which appears to be made of frosted glass or plastic, providing a modern and minimalist aesthetic. The base of the pole is simple and unadorned, suggesting a utilitarian design suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or plazas. The lamppost lacks any visible decorative elements, signage, or attachments, emphasizing its functional purpose. The overall structure is streamlined, with the lamp head being the only prominent feature atop the pole. The materials and construction suggest durability and resistance to outdoor conditions.
description: A minimalist black lamppost with a single spherical white lamp head, mounted on a flat, paved surface. The design is modern and functional, with no decorative elements.
description_view_0: The lamppost is centered on a wide, textured ground, with the spherical lamp head clearly visible atop the slender black pole.
description_view_1: From this angle, the lamppost remains centered, and the pole and lamp head are seen directly from the front, emphasizing the symmetry.
description_view_2: The view is similar to the previous, showing the lamppost from a slightly different angle, with the lamp head and pole still clearly visible.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the lamppost from the opposite side, maintaining the same minimalist appearance with the lamp head atop the pole.
